name: meow-uv

metadata.name: meow-uv
metadata.summary: Determines if a string is a meow

documentation:
# meow-uv

Determines if a given string is a valid cat sound.

modules.name: meow
documentation: Valid cat sounds in different languages

functions.name: meow.is_meow
documentation:
Checks if a given string is a valid cat sound

Args:
    text: The string to check
    
Returns:
    bool: True if the string is a valid cat sound, false otherwise
